mechanism: Ephedrine and pseudoephedrine are mixed-acting sympathomimetics that increase noradrenergic signaling at alpha and beta receptors.
contraindications: avoid with uncontrolled hypertension, arrhythmias, or stimulant medications
safetyNotes: Serious cardiovascular and neuropsychiatric adverse events are well documented; nonprescription ephedra-containing supplements are restricted/banned in several jurisdictions including the U.S. supplement market.

sources.title: Final rule declaring dietary supplements containing ephedrine alkaloids adulterated (FDA, 2004)
sources.note: Regulatory safety action and risk rationale.
